$comment: Mirrors the app/cli workspace pattern: NodeNext/strict/.js extensions. Type-only package — it re-exports a few core TYPES (TurnRecord/CacheTier/...) via the @block-agent/core source exports map + the workspace symlink (NodeNext resolution); it never imports a core VALUE, so it carries zero runtime dependency on core (core is a devDep, present only so `tsc` can resolve the type re-exports). Build-free dev (no tsc -b step).
